attrs.description: Semantic form/admin metadata for frontend renderers.

is_active.description: Designates whether this user should be treated as active. Unselect this instead of deleting accounts.
is_active.title: Active

is_staff.description: Designates whether the user can log into this admin site.
is_staff.title: Staff Status

is_active.description: Designates whether this user should be treated as active. Unselect this instead of deleting accounts.
is_active.title: Active

is_staff.description: Designates whether the user can log into this admin site.
is_staff.title: Staff Status

get.description: List registered model objects. Supports search (`q`), ordering (`o` with 1-based column indexes), pagination (`p`/`page`, `pp`, `all`), facets (`_facets`), alternate row identity (`_to_field`), and Django-style field lookup filters such as `field__in`, `field__isnull`, and date hierarchy parameters like `created_at__year`.

parameters.description: Search term matched against the admin search fields.
parameters.name: q

schema.description: Search term matched against the admin search fields.
schema.title: Q

parameters.description: Ordering token list using 1-based changelist column indexes, e.g. `1,-2`.
parameters.name: o

schema.description: Ordering token list using 1-based changelist column indexes, e.g. `1,-2`.
schema.title: O

parameters.description: 1-based page number, or `last`.
parameters.name: p

schema.description: 1-based page number, or `last`.
schema.title: P

parameters.description: Legacy alias for `p`; generated links use `p`.
parameters.name: page

schema.description: Legacy alias for `p`; generated links use `p`.
schema.title: Page

parameters.description: Page size override from 1 to 200.
parameters.name: pp

schema.description: Page size override from 1 to 200.
schema.title: Pp

parameters.description: Show all rows when allowed by the admin.
parameters.name: all

schema.description: Show all rows when allowed by the admin.
schema.title: All

parameters.description: Enable optional facet counts.
parameters.name: _facets

schema.description: Enable optional facet counts.
schema.title: Facets

parameters.description: Use an allowed alternate object id field.
parameters.name: _to_field

schema.description: Use an allowed alternate object id field.
schema.title: To Field
